items.title: Cloudflare says AI made 1,100 jobs obsolete, even as revenue hit a record high
items.summary: Cloudflare announced that AI automation led to the obsolescence of 1,100 jobs, highlighting the significant impact of AI on employment despite the company's record revenue growth.

items.title: Skill1: Unified Evolution of Skill-Augmented Agents via Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: Researchers propose Skill1, a framework for the unified evolution of skill-augmented agents using reinforcement learning, enabling more complex and adaptable AI behaviors.

items.title: MiniCPM-o 4.5: Towards Real-Time Full-Duplex Omni-Modal Interaction
items.summary: The MiniCPM-o 4.5 model aims to achieve real-time, full-duplex omni-modal interaction, representing a significant step towards more natural human-AI communication.

items.title: Testing ads in ChatGPT
items.summary: OpenAI is reportedly testing advertisements within ChatGPT, indicating a potential shift in its monetization strategy and user experience.

items.title: Beyond Semantic Similarity: Rethinking Retrieval for Agentic Search via Direct Corpus Interaction
items.summary: A new paper explores moving beyond traditional semantic similarity in retrieval systems for agentic search, advocating for direct interaction with the corpus to improve results.

items.title: Continuous Latent Diffusion Language Model
items.summary: A novel approach introduces the Continuous Latent Diffusion Language Model, pushing the boundaries of generative AI for language tasks.

items.title: The Local Model That Doesn't Sleep: Gemma 4 + MTP as a Marathon Engine
items.summary: This article explores the potential of Gemma 4 combined with MTP to create a continuously running local AI model, suggesting a shift towards more viable on-device intelligence.

items.title: MiA-Signature: Approximating Global Activation for Long-Context Understanding
items.summary: Researchers introduce MiA-Signature, a method for approximating global activation to enhance long-context understanding in AI models, crucial for processing extensive information.

items.title: RaguTeam at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Meno and Friends in a Judge-Orchestrated LLM Ensemble for Faithful Multi-Turn Response Generation
items.summary: RaguTeam's participation in SemEval-2026 Task 8 showcases a judge-orchestrated LLM ensemble designed to generate more faithful and coherent multi-turn responses.

items.title: When to Trust Imagination: Adaptive Action Execution for World Action Models
items.summary: This paper investigates the critical question of when AI agents should trust their 'imagination' and adapt action execution within world action models, improving agent autonomy.

items.title: MARBLE: Multi-Aspect Reward Balance for Diffusion RL
items.summary: MARBLE presents a new approach for Multi-Aspect Reward Balance in Diffusion Reinforcement Learning, aiming to optimize learning across various reward signals.

items.title: Why does AI lie? Hallucinations explained simply
items.summary: An article provides a simple explanation for why AI models 'lie' or hallucinate, demystifying a common challenge in AI development and usage.

items.title: SkillOS: Learning Skill Curation for Self-Evolving Agents
items.summary: SkillOS proposes a system for learning skill curation, enabling AI agents to self-evolve and adapt their capabilities over time.

items.title: I Built My Mom an AI Recipe Helper for Mother's Day
items.summary: A developer shares a personal project of creating an AI-powered recipe helper for Mother's Day, demonstrating practical and accessible AI applications.

items.title: Using Claude Code with Docker Model Runner
items.summary: A practical guide demonstrates how to integrate and use Claude's code generation capabilities with a Docker Model Runner, streamlining development workflows.
